mapper.select: SELECT f.SENDER_NO, f.RECEIVER_NO, f.STATUS, m.MEMBER_NO AS friendNo, m.MEMBER_NAME AS friendName, m.ONLINE_STATUS AS onlineStatus FROM FRIEND f JOIN MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_NO = CASE WHEN f.SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} THEN f.RECEIVER_NO WHEN f.RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo} THEN f.SENDER_NO END WHERE f.STATUS = 'Y' AND (f.SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} OR f.RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo}) ORDER BY m.ONLINE_STATUS ASC, m.MEMBER_NAME ASC

SELECT f.SENDER_NO, f.RECEIVER_NO, f.STATUS, m.MEMBER_NO AS friendNo, m.MEMBER_NAME AS friendName, m.ONLINE_STATUS AS onlineStatus FROM FRIEND f JOIN MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_NO = f.SENDER_NO WHERE f.RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo} AND f.STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY f.SENDER_NO DESC
